title: Adding bash Completions
body: These are not ready to merge, mainly because I want to discuss the CLI.  I went and did a pass at this to see how buildah worked.  I think we need to improve some of the CLI before we announce this to the world.

comments.body: Since the CLI has changed a lot, I think this patch could be looked at for merging.
Ok these seem to work fairly well now.  I think it is time to merge.
